networkfirewall.rulegroup.statelessrules.Docs: Defines an array of individual custom action definitions that are available for use by the stateless rules in this `StatelessRulesAndCustomActions` specification. You name each custom action that you define, and then you can use it by name in your stateless rule [AWS::NetworkFirewall::RuleGroup RuleDefinition](aws-properties-networkfirewall-rulegroup-ruledefinition.md) `Actions` specification.
Defines the set of stateless rules for use in a stateless rule group.
